svg.title: AoA Operating Principles stone tablet
svg.desc: Operating principles: Source boundaries stay visible. Review precedes automation. Provenance survives synthesis. Repetition becomes durable technique. Layers specialize; vocabulary holds. Humans can read what agents can use.
svg.metadata: {"kind": "profile-svg", "surface": "8Dionysus README", "title": "Operating principles", "principles": ["Source boundaries stay visible.", "Review precedes automation.", "Provenance survives synthesis.", "Repetition becomes durable technique.", "Layers specialize; vocabulary holds.", "Humans can read what agents can use."], "notes": "Visible lettering is drawn as pixel blocks. Machine-readable text is preserved in title, desc, metadata, hidden text nodes, and README alt text. Moss is rendered as dry lichen clusters rather than drips."}

g.text: Humans can read what agents can use.
